subject: Muscular bald humanoid with a third eye on the forehead, in fighting stance
description: A heavily muscular bald humanoid figure stands in an open fighting stance with arms raised and feet planted. The third eye on the forehead is clearly visible — the diagnostic feature that distinguishes this character from a human. The figure wears a martial arts outfit: orange/red top, green pants. A golden energy aura radiates from the body. The background is a bright yellow-gold energy burst. The pose is confident and open, like a martial arts ready stance.
foreground: Muscular bald figure with third eye, orange/green martial arts outfit, energy aura
